# Senior Services Adult Family Home

> Licensed adult family home in Mount Vernon, WA serving Skagit County — private bedrooms, 24-hour personalized senior care, and dementia support in a six-resident residential setting.

## Pages

- [Home](/heritage): Overview of the home, bedroom availability, services, and amenities.
- [About](/heritage/about): The family and caregivers behind the home; mission and history.
- [Services](/heritage/services): Senior care services — daily living, meals, medication management, dementia care, 24-hour supervision.
- [Bedrooms](/heritage/rooms): Six private bedrooms with live availability and photo galleries.
- [Admissions](/heritage/admissions): How to start the move-in conversation, tour, and review fit.
- [Resources](/heritage/resources): Family questions, comparing care settings, and licensing.
- [Schedule a Tour](/heritage/tour): Book an in-person tour of the home.
- [Contact](/heritage/contact): Phone, email, address, and map.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
- [Accessibility](/accessibility)
